mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your sense of entitlement is our top priority! Because you deserve it all."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, imagine this: I once walked into a coffee shop, and as I was waiting for my order, I overheard the barista getting someone else's name wrong. Well, obviously, I couldn't let this injustice stand. When it was my turn, I confidently gave my order as "Hot Josh," making sure to emphasize the "Hot" part. The barista, clearly not recognizing my importance, proceeded to write down just "Josh" on my cup. I mean, the nerve! I promptly demanded to see the manager, who I educated on the importance of proper customer service and insisted on a public apology. Needless to say, I left that coffee shop feeling vindicated and validated in my entitlement. Because in the world of Hot Josh, you either get it right or face the consequences!
